ab: ’una ku tacini kʉkʉnang marisinatʉ Pa’ʉ kisʉʉn, paira nguain roimi marivici nonoman.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Pa’ʉ，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Pa’ʉ, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: noo tia cu marisinatʉ, sumasuruvai na cucumeni siarisinatʉ, sia’ucu’ucu nukai tapasinatʉ.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: nakai, ’una nguain aka niurina. paira sumasuruvai ka’anʉ mai’i.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: ’una cani taniara. arakukunu kim mutaira sumasima’ʉ.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: na cacanʉ, tia muta’i sua Pa’ʉ. nakai niroimi nguain marivici cirikami.
ch: 路途中，Pa’ʉ想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Pa’ʉ wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: sumasuruvai nguain na kʉkʉnang, nakai arivariʉn kavangvang makasi, koo ku kangvang marivici cirikami.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: mamumʉkʉ cu Pa’ʉ. arakuracʉ makasi, miseni kamu ka’anʉ ’apasuruvai ’ikua cirikami?
ch: Pa’ʉ急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙？
en: Pa’ʉ burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tuturuʉn kʉkʉnang, vanai sii ka’anʉ kasu takacicini marivici. mataa sumasuruvai kasu nonoman, ka’anʉ mai’i.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: akini taniara. mucʉmcʉm Pa’ʉ mukusa tarisinata. siniruvai nonoman ai’iʉn kee na kʉkʉnang.
ch: 隔天上學，Pa’ʉ很早就到學校了，Pa’ʉ把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Pa’ʉ arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: musu’ʉvʉ Pa’ʉ na kʉkʉnang. makasi, no’unaan tia kani takacicini marivici nonoman. sosomanpe misee na kʉkʉnang, me’inaan nipasuruvai ’inia nonoman.
ch: Pa’ʉ向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Pa’ʉ apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
